zh.lifeSummary: 當Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga於1268年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞曼托瓦曼托瓦時，他的父親Guido Corradi28歲，母親Estrambina San Martino24歲。他於1290年之前與Richilda Ramberti結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1339年登記服兵役。他於1335年被列為became lord of reggio emilia。他去世於1360年1月18日在他的家鄉享年92歲，埋葬在義大利隆巴迪亞曼托瓦曼托瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga于1268年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞曼托瓦曼托瓦时，他的父亲Guido Corradi28岁，母亲Estrambina San Martino24岁。他于1290年之前与Richilda Ramberti结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1339年登记服兵役。他于1335年被列为became lord of reggio emilia。他去世于1360年1月18日在他的家乡享年92岁，埋葬在意大利隆巴迪亞曼托瓦曼托瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Corradi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Nino, Angelo, Aldo, Elio, Giulio, Dino, Gildo, Igino, Luciano, Renzo, Romolo, Stefano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Corrado  .

variants.name: Corrado
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Luigi, Antonio, Domenic, Enrico, Pasquale, Sal, Salvatore, Alessandro, Attilio, Carlo, Cosmo.
Italian: from the personal name Corrado, from ancient Germanic Chuonrad (see Konrad ).

nameMeanings.name: da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Gonzaga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ana, Eduardo, Guillermo, Juanito, Luz, Manuel, Ricardo, Rufina, Teodosio, Alicia, Andres, Aniceto.  Italian Caesar, Fausto, Clemente, Leonardo.

Spanish: habitational name from a place so named in Mantua, Italy; this was the home of the ruling family of Mantua for almost four centuries, whose most famous son was Saint Aloysius (Luigi) Gonzaga (1568–91), a young Jesuit who died in Rome nursing plague victims.

nameMeanings.name: Luigi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga was born in 1268, in Mantova, Mantova, Lombardy, Italy, his father, Guido Corradi, was 28 and his mother, Estrambina San Martino, was 24. He married Richilda Ramberti before 1290. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1339. In 1335, at the age of 67, his occupation is listed as became lord of reggio emilia. He died on 18 January 1360, in his hometown, at the age of 92, and was buried in Mantova, Mantova, Lombardy, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga est né en 1268, à Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Guido Corradi, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Estrambina San Martino, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Richilda Ramberti avant 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1339. En 1335, à l’âge de 67 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est became lord of reggio emilia. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1360, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga 1268 in Mantova, Mantova, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guido Corradi 28 und seine Mutter Estrambina San Martino 24. Er hat vor 1290 Richilda Ramberti geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1339 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1335, als er 67 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als became lord of reggio emilia aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Januar 1360 im Alter von 92 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Mantova, Mantova, Lombardei, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga è nato il nel 1268 nel Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italia, il suo padre, Guido Corradi, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Estrambina San Martino, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Richilda Ramberti prima del 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1339. Nel 1335, all'età di 67 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come became lord of reggio emilia. Morì il 18 gennaio 1360, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolto a Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Luigi I Corradi da Gonzagaが1268年にイタリアロンバーディアマントヴァマントヴァで生まれた時，父Guido Corradiは28歳，母Estrambina San Martinoは24歳であった。1290年以前にRichilda Rambertiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1339年に兵役登録をした。1335年，67歳の時，職業はbecame lord of reggio emiliaと記録されている。彼は1360年1月18日に故郷で92歳で死去し，イタリアロンバーディアマントヴァマントヴァにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga(이)가 1268년 이탈리아 롬바디아 먼토바 먼토바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guido Corradi(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Estrambina San Martino(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1290년 이전 Richilda Ramberti(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1335년, 67세의 나이로 그의 직업은 became lord of reggio emilia이었다. 그는 1360년 1월 18일 그의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 롬바디아 먼토바 먼토바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga nasceu em 1268, em Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Guido Corradi, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Estrambina San Martino, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Richilda Ramberti antes 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1339. Em 1335, com 67 anos, sua profissão aparece como became lord of reggio emilia. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1360, em sua cidade natal, com 92 anos, e foi sepultado em Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga родился в 1268 г. в местности мантова, мантова, ломбардя, Италия, его отцу по имени Guido Corradi было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Estrambina San Martino, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Richilda Ramberti перед 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1339 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1335 году, в возрасте 67 лет, работал по профессии became lord of reggio emilia. Он умер 18 января 1360 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности мантова, мантова, ломбардя, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga nació en 1268, en Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Guido Corradi, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Estrambina San Martino, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richilda Ramberti antes de 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1339. En 1335, a la edad de 67 años, su ocupación registrada era became lord of reggio emilia. Murió el 18 de enero de 1360, en su pueblo, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultado en Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italia.
